subject: A small, large-headed humanoid figure (Tarutaru-type race from FFXI) wearing a beret-style hat with tribal trim and layered earth-toned robes, holding a small glowing object, seated in a warm wooden interior
description: A diminutive figure with a round, oversized head, large expressive eyes, and pointed ears characteristic of the Tarutaru race from Final Fantasy XI. The figure wears a wide beret with decorative trim and a layered orange-and-brown robe with textured panels. One hand is raised and holds a small glowing gemstone or orb. The setting is a warm wooden interior — barrel staves or shelving visible behind. The art is rendered in a photorealistic 3D style consistent with FFXI's visual signature. The card frame labels this card 'Backup / Mage' from Final Fantasy XI.
foreground: Tarutaru mage figure in beret and robes holding a glowing orb
background: Warm wooden interior with planks and shelving
